title: Donne431's Craftable Iron Golem Spawn Egg
description: This mod add a recipe for iron golem spawn egg.
body:
## 📜 Description

**This modification just adds a craft for the iron golem spawn egg.**

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/246b66fe7eb139e82313de404929a7fafb5f047e.png)

## 📝 Contact details

 - **My discord: Donne431#6562 / donne431**
 
 - **Discord server:
   https://discord.gg/NQBhQRDEhF**


- **Donate ☕ - https://www.donationalerts.com/r/donne431**
   
## ‼️ Warning
1. **Please, if you have published this mod on another site, provide a link to *CurseForge* or *Modrinth*, thanks in advance.**
